description.short: Internal LLM-as-judge for the eval-score CLI.
description.full: Internal Microsoft 365 Copilot declarative agent used by the Copilot Connector Workflow eval-score CLI. Scores candidate answers against expected answers using a supplied rubric and returns a deterministic integer 0-100 or strict JSON {"score": number, "reason": string}. No browsing, no connector knowledge, no tools.
